goblin_scout.summary: Fast opener, scout, and ranged harasser with sling stones.

ogre_bruiser.summary: Slow but durable club carrier for shield walls and boss pressure.

kobold_tinkerer.summary: Trap kit specialist who keeps the goblin crew from wasting turns on dwarven mechanisms.

boggart_trickster.summary: Eerie support raider whose charm and hook sell the mischievous monster-hero fantasy.

dwarf_crossbow.summary: Ranged defender with long sight lines.

defeat_semantics.narration: Dwarven defenders reduced to 0 HP are knocked out, not killed.
